MAPPING.DESCRIPTION:
IFDYN-M-0-4
IFDYN-M-0-2
Insert records to DRVD_MTH_DRC_COST Netezza table
MAPPING.NAME: m_DM_RRAP_Ins_DRVD_MTH_DRC_COST

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Sql Query
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT DISTINCT MTH_TM_ID, BASEL_ACCT_ID, TRIM(HGHWY_CD), MTH_CRNT_COST_AMT FROM GDAW.DRVD_MTH_ASST_DRC_COST WHERE MTH_TM_ID = $$TM_ID AND DISCRD_F = 'N' AND DELTA_F = 'Y' AND MTH_CRNT_COST_AMT != 0

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT DISTINCT GDAW.DRVD_MTH_DRC_COST.BASEL_ACCT_ID as BASEL_ACCT_ID, TRIM(GDAW.DRVD_MTH_DRC_COST.HGHWY_CD) as HGHWY_CD, GDAW.DRVD_MTH_DRC_COST.MTH_DRC_COST_AMT as MTH_DRC_COST_AMT FROM GDAW.DRVD_MTH_DRC_COST

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: BASEL_ACCT_ID = in_BASEL_ACCT_ID AND HGHWY_CD = in_HGHWY_CD AND MTH_DRC_COST_AMT = in_MTH_DRC_COST_AMT

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period

TASK.DESCRIPTION:
IFDYN-C-0-4
(where the main script is called from) $$SCRIPT_DIR=/owdev/scripts (the environment; DEV, SYS, UAT, PROD) $$ENVMNT=DEV (the project folder without prefix) $$PROJ_FOLDR=STGN_SCENE (the workflow and session name for the abend log file and triger) $$WRKFLW_SESS=wf_STGN_SCENE_Load_DIMs.s_STGN_SCENE_INS_UPD_SCENE_MBR_ACCT_ACTY_TP_DIM
TASK.NAME: cmd_post_session_failure_alert

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections
Sql Query
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT DISTINCT MTH_TM_ID, BASEL_ACCT_ID, TRIM(HGHWY_CD), MTH_CRNT_COST_AMT FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.DRVD_MTH_ASST_DRC_COST WHERE MTH_TM_ID = $$TM_ID AND DISCRD_F = 'N' AND DELTA_F = 'Y' AND MTH_CRNT_COST_AMT != 0

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup Sql Override
ATTRIBUTE.VALUE: SELECT DISTINCT BASEL_ACCT_ID as BASEL_ACCT_ID, TRIM(HGHWY_CD) as HGHWY_CD, MTH_DRC_COST_AMT as MTH_DRC_COST_AMT FROM $$TBL_PRE_4.DRVD_MTH_DRC_COST

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_DRVD_MTH_DRC_COST.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_DRVD_MTH_DRC_COST.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Del_DRVD_MTH_DRC_COST.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_DRVD_MTH_DRC_COST.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_DRVD_MTH_DRC_COST.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_DM_RRAP_Ins_DRVD_MTH_DRC_COST.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub

FOLDER.NAME: SHARED
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Where all shared objects will reside. Only save sources, targets, transformations and mapplets in this folder. Never save any mappings in here!!!!
